name: CFOs of small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For CFOs of small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing recurring subscription expenses
